overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a character standing in a grand gothic castle hall illuminated by warm candlelight. Students in dark robes walk through the marble-floored entrance hall featuring a central equestrian statue, while the camera remains stationary observing the ambient activity.

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a grand gothic castle entrance hall with warm candlelight illuminating the patterned marble floors. A large equestrian statue dominates the center background while students in dark robes walk through the space in various directions. The camera remains stationary in third-person perspective behind a stationary character, capturing the ambient activity and architectural details of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary observation of a grand gothic castle entrance hall filled with ambient movement and warm light. It begins with a view from behind a stationary character, focusing on the intricate patterns of the marble floors illuminated by flickering candlelight. As the eye moves deeper into the space, the perspective encompasses students in dark robes drifting across the hall in various directions. The scene then expands to reveal a massive equestrian statue dominating the center background, anchoring the architectural scale of the environment. Finally, the camera lingers on the interplay between the shadowy gothic arches and the soft glow of the interior lighting.
